intro_text: Find answers to common questions about reservations, private events, dietary accommodations, and our dining experience.

items.question: What is your cancellation policy for reservations?
items.answer: We request that any cancellations or modifications to your reservation be made at least **24 hours in advance**. For large parties or special events, please refer to your confirmation email for specific policies or contact our [support team](/contact).

items.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions and food allergies?
items.answer: Yes, we accommodate all major dietary requirements, including gluten-free, vegan, and nut-free diets. Please note your request when booking or inform your server. You can view our full allergen guide on our [menus page](/menu).

items.question: Is there a dress code at the restaurant?
items.answer: We recommend a **smart casual** dress code. We ask that guests refrain from wearing swimwear or athletic attire in the main dining room.

items.question: Can I host a private event or large group dinner?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer tailored packages for private events, corporate functions, and family gatherings. Please visit our [private events page](/spaces) to explore our spaces and submit an inquiry form.

items.question: Do you provide off-site catering services?
items.answer: We offer full-service catering for off-site events. Our team handles everything from custom menu design to professional service staffing. Contact us at events@restaurant.local for details.
